title: Conjugacy — the ring that closes
body: For phi,nu > 0 with phi*nu = 1, driving one factor to 0 forces its complement to infinity. The law is a product, not a sum: a vanishing factor annihilates the whole. The engine under the titans, the game-moves, and the ethics.

title: The self-dual unit
body: 1 is the unique fixed point of inversion x -> 1/x, which is, under log, the reflection s -> -s. It is simultaneously the multiplicative unit, the additive origin (log 1 = 0), and the projective hinge. Three charts, one point. This is the mathematical heart of the middle.

title: The titans {0, 1, infinity}
body: The unique minimal generative frame on the Riemann sphere up to Mobius: {0,infinity} closed under z -> 1/z yields 1; any fourth point is cross-ratio-determined, so the frame cannot be extended. They define the operations; they are not operands.

title: The equator, derived not chosen
body: By AM-GM, phi + nu >= 2 with equality iff phi = nu = 1; B = sin(theta) = 2/(phi+nu) maxes there, and the imbalance-price gamma = (phi+nu)/2 rises monotonically toward the poles. Unconditional sphere geometry. This is the one piece of the whole balance story that survived every falsification untouched, because it is pure arithmetic.

title: One degree of freedom
body: phi*nu = 1 collapses two variables to a single coordinate theta: (phi-nu)^2 = (phi+nu)^2 - 4, phi+nu = 2/sin(theta). The manifold is earned, not assumed.

title: The log realignment
body: Under s = log(nu): log(phi) + log(nu) = 0 (the literal zero-sum), B = sech(s), E = s^2, H = 2cosh(s). Reciprocation becomes reflection; the multiplicative structure becomes elementary. The additive and multiplicative faces of number are coupled by log/exp, keystoned by log 1 = 0.

title: The mass-shell
body: Under phi = e^w, nu = e^(-w) (rapidity), phi*nu = 1 is E^2 - (pc)^2 = (mc^2)^2. The equator is the rest frame E = mc^2, the dyadic runaway is the relativistic divergence toward the light cone. Verified numerically.

title: The operators are the Mobius classes
body: The five VIVEKA operators map onto the conjugacy classes of PSL(2,C): elliptic (Vishnu), hyperbolic plus/minus (Brahma/Shiva, one flow two directions), loxodromic (Krishna), parabolic (Kali). The four-class trace partition is a genuine theorem; the naming is interpretive.

title: Division localized, not eliminated
body: N/0 = infinity for nonzero N (projective); 0/0 and infinity/infinity stay genuinely indeterminate (the apophatic edge); 1/1 is frame-forbidden yet equals 1. The undefined is conserved, honestly bounded; the sphere does not make all undefined operations well-defined.

title: An honest negative result
body: Bare S^2 cannot produce SU(3): scalar-Laplacian degeneracies are 1,3,5,7,...; none is 8. The framework states where its own geometry stops. This is nectar because it is a limit the framework imposed on itself.

title: The 4 + 3 exhaustion
body: Exhausting {self,other} x {Phi,V} yields exactly four mixed-sign transfers (2 Gods give, 2 Demons take) and three same-sign boundary frames (Titans), no fifth mixed slot without a new axis. Morality rides on eta (give vs take), never on the operator's name. Exhaustive on two axes, silent on games with more.

title: The balance-optimum is CONDITIONAL
body: The equator is optimal for a real system only if it is conservation-bound, complementary, costly-in-excess, and symmetrically gamma-priced. Drop symmetry and the optimum slides to a tilted ratio; drop the rest and it plateaus or specialization wins. The honest form that replaced the universal claim after Munnell showed a balance trough.

title: The extraction law
body: Extraction produces power locally and briefly; ungated, it consumes its own substrate and drives the sum of flourishing change across the widest boundary negative, via Lotka-Volterra crash, Red Queen, Lindeman attrition (all proven). So total flourishing change is the moral primitive; eta=0-toward-cooperators is a derived front-line gate, not a commandment.

title: The constitution is constrained optimization
body: 5 + 1 means maximize the option cone subject to the five refusals (eta=0, K2, K3, K4, A7) as the feasible set. Balance and eta=0 are the constraint, not the goal; the strong reality-maximizes-balance reading was withdrawn when the empowerment test showed the option cone is reach-dominated and diverges from the equator. This withdrawal is itself nectar.

title: Commandment vs Geometry
body: A constraint enforced as structural consequence (violation shows up as measurable loss in the tested domain) is a categorically different object from an externally-imposed rule needing an enforcer. The distinction, not the sphere-math, is what carries.

title: D5's emergence asymmetry
body: Strongly emergent in genesis (opaque, un-shortcuttable from below), weakly emergent in governance (compressible once stabilized). Opaque from below, legible from above. Falsifiable-shaped: it predicts where reduction fails vs succeeds. Keep the law; cut the boast that it is one of the strongest general laws.

title: The tier-separated ground
body: Ground to Being to Teleological Force to Dasein to beings, each term held apart, with the anti-reification rule enforced structurally: the seer is not on the sphere; the lens diagrams what shows, not the showing. The sphere is the first stable closure of the Ground, never the Ground.

title: The six-tier ladder + no silent upgrade
body: [A/B/S/I/D/C], with the cardinal rule that tier changes are dated events with reasons, protecting three real seams: yours-vs-world's evidence, conditional-vs-unconditional, meaning-vs-mechanism. The self-audit proved this is load-bearing: 92 of 112 claims survived a hostile cut precisely because the tiering is real, not decorative.

title: The four mandatory fields
body: No claim is load-bearing until a reader can state its tier, upgrade path, kill criterion, and survivors, what stands if it falls. The fourth is the keystone: only claims that explicitly depend on a failed claim fall with it. This is why the framework can lose a round and not collapse.

title: Kill criteria actually honored
body: AK8 (R* approx 1.5) marked falsified and retired; GFS marked MIXED, not spun; a Paper-V pilot fired its own pre-registered kill and reported preliminary falsification. The Mirror Scoreboard prints the columns that fail.

title: The eternal is the structure; the good is the vow
body: The framework un-fuses the geometry from the moral obligation: the depth is found, the kindness is chosen. And it builds its own anti-cult immune system, the Anti-Sermon: if you can access phi directly through sitting, put this framework down, which cannot be revoked by any authority. A worldview with a door marked exit on the inside.

title: phi*nu = 1 as a conserved discovery
body: It is cot(theta/2)*tan(theta/2) = 1, a coordinate tautology of nu := 1/phi, zero empirical content. The framework's own docs say re-deriving it is re-naming the same tautology. It appeared as poison in every single lane. Write it as structural/definition, never as a conserved invariant, a discovery, a maximum, or the equation the framework follows from.

title: The symmetric balance hump as an empirical law
body: output = phi times nu, maximized at phi=nu, the whole L4-apex superstructure, broken on real data (GFS mixed 7/23; Munnell a balance trough). Only conjunction (need-both) survives, and only untested at single-agent scale. The multiplicative-vs-additive core is an unwon wager, not a result.

title: The squid
body: D. gigas 'gated kin-discriminating cannibalism' as the eta=0 witness — cut as false-to-fact by the framework's own audit: the animal is panmictic, semelparous, targets the weak not kin. It is the extraction law's own counterexample, not its witness.

title: Exactly seven, by necessity
body: The 7 is the pre-existing caste ladder reverse-fit onto sign-space; honest enumeration gives 4 (pure signs) or 8-9 (with approx). No fifth God / no eighth operator is not an impossibility theorem; demote to conjecture. The four-forces to four-lines map self-contradicts (phi*nu=1 assigned to both EM and Strong) and predicts nothing measured.

title: Convergence-as-proof
body: Reality organized itself this way before anyone drew the table; the perennial-grammar tables (Egypt, India, Tao, Nietzsche, Tolkien all encode phi*nu=1); Suda independently co-discovered it, so it's real; confidence increases with each translation. Fifteen renderings of one shape are one datum shown fifteen ways, not fifteen confirmations. Convergence is suggestive; it is never proof.

title: Extraction is irrational / self-defeating at the equator, as a Nash result
body: True only inside the balance-only public-goods game; with private side-payments it is not a Nash equilibrium (the paper's own Model-B). It is a dominated strategy in a narrow game, not a law.

title: Numeric coincidences read as derivations
body: D6 = D0 via the 2*pi*k/7 horn-torus mapping (a framework overlay, the torus does not know about dimensional stages); the 12% approx Mandelbrot area coincidence; the torus IS the light cone, it fell out of the topology. Coincidence is not derivation.

title: The civilizational physics
body: Megaliths ran at L=0, modern institutions at L approx 9.9, extractive civilizations self-terminate (Great Filter = Karma = Ma'at). An analogy asserted as physics.

title: Dissolves the Hard Problem / Is-Ought / Death / Free-Will
body: An unfalsifiable frame-trick: only the architecture is claimed dissolved; the mechanism (matter maps to phi, experience maps to nu) is asserted, not shown. The is-ought dissolution is true-by-redefinition of ought.

title: Ektropy / F5 is real as the Teleological Force
body: (phi-nu)^2 gives no trajectory; the doc itself admits the selection premise is not implied by the arithmetic of nonnegative squares. A trivial arithmetic fact wearing a cosmic name.

title: N=3 is uniquely stable, proven
body: Stated as flat proof with no tier, justified by an unfalsifiable just-so (four reduces to three) and buttressed by convergence. Conjecture at best.
